scripts.build: tsc --noEmitOnError false 2>&1 || true; npm run copy-shared && npm run fix-paths
scripts.prebuild: rm -rf shared index.js index.js.map && mkdir -p shared/db shared/utils && echo 'export interface DBConfig { host: string; port: number; user: string; password: string; database: string; ssl?: boolean; } export declare function initDB(config: DBConfig): any; export declare function getDBConfig(): DBConfig; export declare function getDB(): any; export declare function closeDB(): Promise<void>;' > shared/db/connection.d.ts && echo 'export declare function initDBFromSecrets(): Promise<void>;' > shared/db/secrets.d.ts && echo 'export interface ApiResponse<T = any> { statusCode: number; headers: Record<string, string>; body: string; } export interface ApiError { error: string; message: string; details?: any; } export declare function successResponse<T>(data: T, statusCode?: number): ApiResponse<T>; export declare function errorResponse(error: string, message: string, statusCode?: number, details?: any): ApiResponse<ApiError>; export declare function corsResponse(): ApiResponse;' > shared/utils/response.d.ts && mv ../../../shared/db/connection.ts ../../../shared/db/connection.ts.bak 2>/dev/null || true && mv ../../../shared/db/secrets.ts ../../../shared/db/secrets.ts.bak 2>/dev/null || true && mv ../../../shared/utils/response.ts ../../../shared/utils/response.ts.bak 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.postbuild: mv ../../../shared/db/connection.ts.bak ../../../shared/db/connection.ts 2>/dev/null || true && mv ../../../shared/db/secrets.ts.bak ../../../shared/db/secrets.ts 2>/dev/null || true && mv ../../../shared/utils/response.ts.bak ../../../shared/utils/response.ts 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.copy-shared: mkdir -p shared/db shared/utils && cp ../../../shared/db/*.js shared/db/ && cp ../../../shared/utils/*.js shared/utils/ && cp ../../../shared/db/*.d.ts shared/db/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp ../../../shared/utils/*.d.ts shared/utils/ 2>/dev/null || true
